title: Relationships between people and nature: Nature connectedness and relational environmental values.

assets.abstract: There is growing recognition that our relationship with nature needs repairing. Two operationalizations of this construct within psychology are nature connectedness and relational environmental values. This review covers recent advances on both constructs. It outlines the growing evidence that both operationalizations are strong predictors of pro-environmental outcomes. It goes on to review what is known about the antecedents of the human-nature relationship and outlines three emerging principle

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Ecology/Animism — nature connectedness, biophilia, environmental neuroscience.
